name: nest-drizzle-native-workspace
description: Community standalone monorepo for nest-drizzle-native and samples

scripts.test:cov: c8 --all --include "packages/drizzle/**/*.ts" --exclude "packages/drizzle/test/**" --exclude "packages/drizzle/interfaces.ts" --exclude "packages/drizzle/index.ts" --exclude "**/*.d.ts" --exclude "**/dist/**" --reporter text --reporter text-summary --reporter json-summary --reporter lcov --check-coverage --branches 100 --functions 100 --lines 100 --statements 100 npm run test:report
scripts.release:check:pack: npm run build --workspace nest-drizzle-native && node scripts/check-package-pack.mjs
scripts.release:check: npm run release:check:readme-links && npm run release:check:sample-versions && npm run release:check:pack && npm run release:check:consumer
scripts.ci:docs: npm --prefix website ci && npm --prefix website run build
scripts.security:audit: npm run security:audit:package && npm run security:audit:docs
scripts.sample:focused: npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-01-basic-client && npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-02-repositories && npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-03-for-root-async && npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-04-named-connections && npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-05-transactions-cls && npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-06-manual-transaction && npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-07-validation-drizzle-zod && npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-08-validation-class-validator && npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-09-error-mapping && npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-10-testing-utilities && npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-11-raw-sql-escape-hatch && npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-12-swagger-openapi && npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-13-zod-openapi-bridge && npm run test --workspace nest-drizzle-native-sample-14-better-sqlite3-driver
scripts.sample: npm run showcase && npm run sample:focused
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run test:cov && npm run complexity:check && npm run complexity:report && npm run release:check && npm run ci:docs && npm run security:audit && npm run ci:sample
